race.description: Des Ross Am & Joyce Ross Am Memorial (Bm56) Hcp
race.comment: I'M KENNY (5) came back in trip last time out and was just fair, but a return to this course and distance looks a good move on his performances prior. Drawing the inside here should help his chances and he can give them something to catch. I AM RALPH (3) is on the quick turnaround here with Holder on board. Out to 1600m now should suit him better and he can sit closer than what we've seen recently. Keep safe. IOANE (2) is stepping out at this circuit for the first time. Last appeared when he finished sixth over 1396m at Port Augusta on June 7. Finds a nice race and is worth including. COVERT WITNESS (18) is third-up today and can show more.
